calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar Sep-23-2015 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for Petitioner Gianfranco Putzolu

The Court stated that there were execution issues regarding the third codicil to the will, in that the declarations submitted by the subscribing witnesses were inconsistent with the attestation clause in the codicil in that they were not both present in the decedent's and each other's presence at the time at the time of execution of the codicil, and that they were uncertain as to the amount of any hand-written notations on the codicil. Mr. Madden stated that while the codicil may not have been executed in conformity with the Probate Code, he believed that it correctly stated the intent of the testator and reflected her last wishes. He confirmed that there was no opposition to the petition, and that if the codicil were permitted, it would result in the reduction of the recovery by the Petitioner, who was seeking to have it admitted. He submitted the matter to the Court for determination. The Court stated that he was inclined to grant the petition with the third codicil, as the petitioner's declaration was sufficient to provide an evidentiary showing of the testator's intent that it be included, and that issues regarding the handwritten additions and the loan forgiveness could be addressed at a later time. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond was set at $100,000.00. The Court set a status hearing re closing of estate for July 10, 2017, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
